Description
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.

    Method
    Description
    Path
    GraphNode.getPath(GraphNode toNode)
     
    static final Path
    Path.getPathToTop(GraphNode node)
    This static method creates a path leading from the input node to the root node of the sentence.
    static final Path
    Path.getPathToTop(GraphNode node, int verbosity)
    This static method creates a path leading from the input node to the root node of the sentence.
    static final Path
    Path.makePath(GraphNode start_node, GraphNode end_node)
    This static method returns the shortest path that connects the two nodes.
